name: marketing-os
hook: Your AI agent can now run marketing like an operating system.
post: The `marketing-os` skill orchestrates the full library across strategy, demand, conversion, pipeline, retention, measurement, and assets. It helps Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, and Agent Skills-compatible agents choose the right workflow instead of guessing which marketing task comes next.
cta: Install it: npx skills add scayver/marketing-skills --skill marketing-os. Star the repo: https://github.com/scayver/marketing-skills.

name: github-prospects
hook: `github-prospects.js` turns agent advice into executable marketing ops.
post: This zero-dependency Node.js CLI gives your agent a practical helper for developer intent command-line helper for GitHub. It outputs JSON, supports scriptable workflows, and fits Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, and Windsurf projects where marketing work needs real platform actions instead of another checklist.
cta: Try it: `node tools/clis/github-prospects.js --dry-run`. Install Marketing Skills OS: npx skills add scayver/marketing-skills. Repo: https://github.com/scayver/marketing-skills.
